item.title: PGATOURComms: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 11min Patrick Cantlay's second-round 64 marks his best score in nine starts in t
item.description:
PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 11min Patrick Cantlay's second-round 64 marks his best score in nine starts in the RBC Heritage.
Cantlay has recorded a score in the 60s in 24 of his 32 career rounds at Harbour Town. He owns six top-10s in eight prior starts in the RBC Heritage, including five top-three finishes. 2 9 2 mil

item.title:
PGATOUR: PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 15min Back-to-back birdies for Viktor Hovland
He moves to 6-under on the day and is just one back
item.description:
PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 15min Back-to-back birdies for Viktor Hovland
He moves to 6-under on the day and is just one back of Matt Fitzpatrick's lead.
Golf Channel 4 8 58 13 mil

item.title: PGATOURComms: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 22min The Zurich Classic of New Orleans has featured a two-man team format since
item.description:
PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 22min The Zurich Classic of New Orleans has featured a two-man team format since 2017 and is the only official FedExCup event on the PGA TOUR schedule that uses a team format.
The field consists of 74 teams (148 players), with each team comprised of two professionals.
Zurich Classic Mostrar más 5 10 31 10 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 25min #CLIPPED — The deleted TNT Sports video of LIV CEO Scott O’Neil has been clipped an repos
item.description: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 25min #CLIPPED — The deleted TNT Sports video of LIV CEO Scott O’Neil has been clipped an reposted, leaving out him saying the league is funded through the season and they’re going to work like crazy to create a business plan to keep LIV going. De TNT Sports 6 9 69 16 mil
